title: thalictrum minus subsp. pseudominus
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. pseudominus, also known as the meadow rue or lesser meadow rue, is a flowering plant in the buttercup family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antitumor properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, and has been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Thalictrum minus subsp. pseudominus include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the plant's flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
